svg.title: 2k26 GM Grader — architecture and data flow
svg.desc: Architecture showing browser-side React app with UI, state, services, and sync layers communicating with the Anthropic API through three call types.
svg.text: CDN cdnjs.cloudflare.com — React 18 · LZString · XLSX · QRCode
On load: window.storage → hydrate · or #gm: hash → auto-restore
Sync warning fires when moves or rumors added since last copy
Storage resets on new artifact URL — sync code bridges sessions
